messages.text: A mantle of avenging wrath blazes around you; your strikes fall with righteous fury and holy power floods your healing.
A mantle of avenging wrath blazes around {name}, wreathing them in righteous fury.
The mantle of avenging wrath sears through you, mending your hurts as it drives your strikes.
The mantle of avenging wrath burns out and the righteous fury drains from you.
The mantle of avenging wrath around {name} burns out.
{name} is wreathed in a blazing mantle of avenging wrath.
